title: 10m Jute Rope, 8mm Thick Jute Twine String, Natural Braided Jute Garden Rope for Cat Scratching Post Ropes, Gardening, Camping, Decoration, Gift Wrapping and Craft Decoration (Brown)
features: NATURAL JUTE ROPE - This jute rope is made of degradable natural jute, non-toxic and harmless, safe to use, and will not harm the environment. The jute rope with a diameter of 8 mm and a length of 10 meters is thick and sturdy. Compared with traditional hemp rope, it can hold items more tightly and can be used in various occasions.

MULTI-STRAND BRAIDING - This jute rope is made of 4 strands of hemp rope. Compared with traditional ropes, this jute rope is stronger and stronger, with uniform thickness, durable, long service life and can hold items more tightly without breaking easily.

STURDY AND DURABLE - Jute rope is flexible, tear-resistant, sturdy and durable. It is a good choice for bundling and fixing items. The hemp rope maintains the natural appearance of burlap and has a decorative effect, making your crafts look more beautiful.

DIY HANDICRAFTS - Jute rope can be used for wall art, DIY vases, etc. Use your imagination to create unique and interesting crafts. Also great for repairing or retying scratching posts, use it to wrap around your cat tree, no longer have to replace the entire tree because of worn scratching post parts.

WIDE RANGE OF USES - This natural jute rope is perfect for DIY scratching posts, wrapping furniture legs, tying gardening, hanging artwork and other handmade decoration projects, etc., can be used to decorate indoor flower pots to create a natural look, suitable for home, garden, store, etc.
description: Features: 1. Soft and comfortable 2. Delicate touch, easy to carry and strong applicability 3. Multi-strand braiding 4.
